summary: Tested Recurring Compliance Engine features. All 24 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Dashboard shows Recurring Compliance card, Employee Profile has Recurring tab with summary cards and Record Completion modal, What's Needed tab has Document Request buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: RecurringComplianceSection.js has eslint warning for missing dependency 'fetchRecurringCompliance' in useEffect - not a bug but could be improved
Minor: EmployeeProfilePage.js has eslint warnings for missing dependencies in useEffect hooks - not blocking functionality
seed_data_creation: Recurring compliance items already exist in system for Olakunle (3 items: Competency Assessment due in 5d, Monthly Supervision upcoming, Spot Check upcoming)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Recurring Compliance Engine fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/recurring-compliance/dashboard-summary, GET /api/employees/{id}/recurring-compliance, POST /api/recurring-compliance/{id}/complete, POST /api/employees/{id}/request-document, POST /api/employees/{id}/request-missing-items. Frontend components: RecurringComplianceSection.js (tab in EmployeeProfilePage), DashboardPage.js (recurring compliance card). Test employee IDs: d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77 (Olakunle, 83%), ccfcbdbb-feda-4043-a8b2-2f1f9da88bdf (Lawrence, 62%).

dashboard_recurring_compliance_card.details: Dashboard shows Recurring Compliance card with Overdue (0), Due Now (1), Upcoming (2) counts and Action Required items list

employee_recurring_tab.details: Recurring tab renders on Employee Profile with 4 summary cards (Overdue/Due Now/Upcoming/Total Active) and list of recurring items

record_completion_modal.details: Record button opens completion modal with Completed Date, Outcome dropdown, and Notes fields

document_request_per_row.details: Send icon buttons appear for each missing document requirement row (found 6 send icons)

request_missing_items_bulk.details: Request Missing Items button appears in What's Needed header when items are missing

api_dashboard_summary.details: Returns org-wide summary with overdue/due/upcoming counts and item lists

api_employee_recurring.details: Returns employee items with computed status and summary counts

api_record_completion.details: Records completion with outcome, notes, auto-calculates next due date

api_request_document.details: Triggers email request for specific document requirement

api_request_missing_items.details: Bulk requests all missing items for employee
